prompt: dashboard.tsx 하나만 종합 품질 검토해줘. 접근성이랑 성능 이슈 위주로 자세히 봐줘

assertions.text: Report contains accessibility section (Section A / 접근성)
Report contains SEO & Web Performance section (Section B)
All 33 KWCAG2.2 items are evaluated (none skipped)
All SEO items (SEO-01 through SEO-11) are evaluated
All WP items (WP-01 through WP-18) are evaluated

Accessibility findings include specific KWCAG item IDs and line references
Performance findings include code-level analysis (layout thrashing, lazy loading, etc.)
